input:
She mentioned her dream to her father and he hit her hard in the face. He said to her: “You surely wish to be wed to the King of the Arabs.” The slap left a visible mark on her face which the Prophet noticed when he married her. He asked her about that mark and she told him its cause. Winning People’s Hearts It has already been reported that according to their agreement with the Prophet, the Jews at Khaybar would stay and look after the land in return for half its produce.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 29: Back on the Move

output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 29: Back on the Move

characters.name: Aisha bint Abu Bakr
characters.appearance: Late teens, light olive skin, slender build, slightly shorter than average. Wearing a simple modest long-sleeved dress with a loose hijab covering her hair, soft brown leather sandals. Gentle features, bright expressive eyes.

characters.name: Abu Bakr al-Siddiq
characters.appearance: Late 40s, light olive skin, slender build, slightly shorter than average. Thin grey-streaked beard with slight reddish henna tint, neatly kept. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Kind gentle eyes, slightly stooped shoulders.

output.moral_lesson: People who have been hurt may still be able to forgive and find peace, as long as they remember Allah's mercy and forgiveness.
output.narrative_text: Aisha told her father about a dream she had, but he was angry with her and hit her hard. The Prophet saw the mark on her face when he married her and asked her about it, showing he cared about her feelings.

compliance.notes: Prophet not shown, but his presence implied. Aisha shown with full face, gentle expression. No graphic violence, but emotional scene.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. Interior of a traditional 7th century Makkah mud-brick home. A young Arab girl, late teens, with light olive skin, wearing a simple long-sleeved dress and loose hijab, sitting on a woven mat, looking down, one hand on her cheek. An older Arab man, late 40s, with light olive skin, thin grey-streaked beard, off-white thobe, brown cloak, and loose head covering, standing in the doorway, looking concerned, one hand on his chest. Simple mud-brick walls, clay water jug in corner. Low-key warm lighting. Medium shot, eye level. Softer colors, no harsh lines. No modern objects.
